meta.title: Active or Passive Detection? - Indegy Sponsor Session
meta.description: Barak Perelman of Indegy defines and makes the case for an Active capability in the class of products that creates an ICS asset inventory and detects attacks on an ICS. At 25:00 there is a video from the City of Raleigh on how they use the Indegy solution.
